name: Gingered Apricot-Baked Pies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Separate the biscuits and roll each out on a floured board to form a thin circle.
3. Mix together the apricots, ginger, and brown sugar in a bowl.
4. Spoon some of the apricot mixture into the center of each biscuit circle.
5. Fold over the biscuits to form a half-moon shape and crimp the edges with a fork to seal them.
6. Make slits in the top of each pie for steam to escape.
7. Brush the pies with egg wash.
8. Bake until golden brown and serve warm. An egg wash containing the yolk will give these a darker golden color, while an egg white egg wash will provide a clear glaze.
